body:
Just change the variable names.

Hila
clean_title: 2D Array Operations and Magic Square Checker
explanation: The first program prompts the user to input numbers into a 6x8 2D array, calculates the sums of each row and column, and displays the array along with the sums. The second program allows the user to input numbers into a 3x3 array and checks if it is a magic square, meaning that the sums of its rows, columns, and diagonals are all equal. It displays whether the array is a magic square or not.
name: 2007-09-19_unnamed
subject: Pascal - Class Exercises
summary: This project contains two Pascal programs that work with 2D arrays to compute sums and check for magic squares.
